name: 和！和！和！RogueXMahjong
short_description: This is a Roguelike game based on mahjong. In the game, you can obtain mahjong cards with different abilities, which may provide higher damage or change the playing rules! You will use your intelligence to combine them to defeat enemies and complete the game.
detailed_description:
Mahjong

The game is designed based on a deck of 144 mahjong tiles.

Sparrow Card

Sparrow cards are the main means of building in games. There are various types of sparrow cards, including those that increase damage in a simple and rough way, those that change the rules of playing cards, those that need to act according to the situation, and those that help you turn danger into safety... but without exception, their function is to make you stronger. Through the coordination of various cards, you will make your mahjong play smoothly without any flaws, and easily pass the level.

Snacks

In the game, there are also props that can be used in real-time, called "snacks". The functions of snacks are also diverse, but most of them are used to modify and adjust your hand. Sometimes, using "snacks" reasonably can have the effect of clearing clouds and turning the tide of the battle.

supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
